description: Composition:White Womens sneaker with contrast color swoosh and low profile vulcanised sole shoe care:1. Brush surface with a soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washThese simple and stylish trainers from nike give you great comfort and casual style. The white leather uppers provide a comfy snug Fit and the contrast blue swoosh logo, padded insole and rubber outsole gives great eye appeal. The low profile vulcanised sole gives light duty grip - perfect for skate boarding and urban living.
